entries.name: Hermes Trismegistus and Hermetic Tradition
entries.definition: Legendary figure attributed with founding Hermetic philosophy and alchemy

attributes.wisdom: Hermes Trismegistus ('Thrice-Greatest Hermes') is the legendary author of the Hermetic Corpus, a collection of philosophical and religious texts that form the foundation of Hermeticism. These writings...
quote: Through Hermes Trismegistus and Hermetic Tradition we find deeper understanding.
The path of Hermetic Philosophy reveals truth through hermes trismegistus and hermetic tradition.
attributes.personality_influence: Influences Hermetic Philosophy governors through hermes trismegistus and hermetic tradition
attributes.conflict_resolution: Applies universal principles to find balance
attributes.growth_potential: Through understanding hermes trismegistus and hermetic tradition

entries.name: The Emerald Tablet
entries.definition: Foundational alchemical text containing core Hermetic principles

attributes.wisdom: The Emerald Tablet is the most famous Hermetic text, containing the fundamental principles of alchemy and spiritual transformation. Its central axiom 'As above, so below' expresses the correspondence ...
quote: Through The Emerald Tablet we find deeper understanding.
The path of Hermetic Philosophy reveals truth through the emerald tablet.

entries.name: Seven Hermetic Principles
entries.definition: Core philosophical laws governing reality according to Hermetic teaching

attributes.wisdom: The Seven Hermetic Principles are fundamental laws that govern all existence: Mentalism (all is mind), Correspondence (as above, so below), Vibration (nothing rests), Polarity (everything is dual), Rh...
quote: Through Seven Hermetic Principles we find deeper understanding.
The path of Hermetic Philosophy reveals truth through seven hermetic principles.

attributes.conflict_resolution: Applies universal principles to find balance

entries.name: Principle of Mentalism
entries.definition: The universe is mental in nature, existing as thoughts in the Universal Mind

attributes.wisdom: The Principle of Mentalism states 'THE ALL IS MIND; The Universe is Mental.' This principle establishes that all of reality is fundamentally mental in nature, created and sustained by universal consci...
quote: Through Principle of Mentalism we find deeper understanding.
The path of Hermetic Philosophy reveals truth through principle of mentalism.
attributes.personality_influence: Influences Hermetic Philosophy governors through principle of mentalism
attributes.conflict_resolution: Applies universal principles to find balance

entries.name: Principle of Correspondence
entries.definition: Harmony between different planes of existence enables understanding

attributes.wisdom: The Principle of Correspondence reveals the harmony between the Mental, Astral, and Physical planes of existence. By understanding patterns on one plane, we can comprehend similar patterns on other pl...
quote: Through Principle of Correspondence we find deeper understanding.
The path of Hermetic Philosophy reveals truth through principle of correspondence.

entries.name: As above, so below - governance must align earthly and cosmic principles
entries.definition: Hermetic Philosophy provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
